codeReview.summary: Reviewed handoff, commit diff, and transcript for the serve.go split. The refactor cleanly extracts setup concerns into dedicated files while preserving runServe orchestration and behavior. Expected structural targets are met (serve.go 252 lines, runServe 161 lines, and 7 new cmd/kindling split files). No high-confidence correctness or maintainability regressions were identified in the reviewed changes.

summary: Feature str-split-serve passes scrutiny review: implementation matches the feature intent, maintains architecture boundaries, and introduces no blocking or non-blocking issues.
